form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 5th over 350m at this track beaten 7 lengths (20.67) behind Fighting Fair in a Mix on April 5. Has the ability to take this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Contacted from behind leaving the first turn and became momentarily unbalanced.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last in a Grade 5 on March 24 over 300m at Casino behind Needle And Seat beaten 15 lengths (17.92). Capable of much better. Worth keeping safe.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (24.27) when sixth over 411m at Casino in a Grade 5. Has two successes and two minors from seven starts from box 5. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Collided , passing the catching pen, lost ground and finished in last place.

form.formComment: Was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, weakening late to finish a 3.5 lengths fourth (20.38) over 350m at this track. Should prove hard to beat.
